title: SUMMER CAMPS - 211info
text: NEXT DOOR SUMMER CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of engaging camps to help local youth stay active and entertained all summer. Camp directors and counselors ensure participants enjoy their summer while feeling safe and supported in new experiences. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: 1st - 8th Grade Registration closed for 2026 summer program Hours: Entering 6th-8th Grade Camp: July 2, 2026 - August 13, 2026; 9am-2pm Thursdays Entering 1st-5th Grade Camp: June 29, 2026 - August 12, 2026; 8:30am-2pm Monday-Wednesday Email (541) 386-6665 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-6665 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: See website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Hood River County Services: Camps General Recreational Activities/Sports Outdoor Environmental Education Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - HEALTH PROMOTION AND CHRONIC DISEASE PREVENTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - GORGE YOUTH MENTORING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTH PROMOTION SERVICES/NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SANA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MID-COLUMBIA HEALTH EQUITY ADVOCATES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TREATMENT SERVICES SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COLUMBIA GORGE PRIDE ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEXT DOOR
